name: axiomancer-mechanics-workspace
description: Workspace root for the axiomancer-mechanics game engine and its CLIs.

scripts.combat: npm run build --workspace packages/engine && npm run combat --workspace packages/cli
scripts.character: npm run build --workspace packages/engine && npm run character --workspace packages/cli
scripts.examples: npm run build && node examples/node-cjs/index.cjs && node examples/node-esm/index.mjs
